name: Adient plc
summary: Adient plc is a global leader in automotive seating supply, designing, manufacturing, and delivering complete seat systems and components for passenger cars, commercial vehicles, and light trucks. Products include complete seating systems, frames, mechanisms, foam, head restraints, armrests, and trim covers. Adient operates approximately 200 manufacturing, assembly, or sequencing facilities in 29 countries, serving all major global OEMs with more than 65,000 employees worldwide.

products.name: Complete Seating Systems
products.description: Full seat assemblies delivered just-in-time or in-sequence to automotive OEM assembly lines.

products.name: Seat Frames and Mechanisms
products.description: Metal structural components and adjustment mechanisms for automotive seats.

products.name: Seating Foam
products.description: Foam components used in automotive seat cushions and backs.

products.name: Trim Covers
products.description: Fabric and material seat covers for automotive seating applications.

products.name: Head Restraints and Armrests
products.description: Safety and comfort components integrated into automotive seating systems.

products.name: Core Product Portfolio (CPP)
products.description: Global strategy for part and design reuse enabling modular, scalable seating systems and interchangeable components.

partnerships.description: Joint venture partnership for automotive seating in China.
